subcodes.first_line: O thou who art gladdened by the tidings of God! The dawn of guidance hath indeed broken forth, yet the blind remain wrapped in thick veils [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من استبشر ببشارات الله قد تبلج صبح الهدی و لکن العمی لفی احتجاب عظیم قد
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
